title: Tracing, Evals, and Failure Analysis · Recovery Bay
summary: Evaluate a multi-turn tool agent across realistic environments. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in an agent trace and evaluation suite and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Record decisions, tool calls, results, state changes, timing, and identifiers without exposing private reasoning.
Evaluate action trajectories and state outcomes as well as final text.
Build deterministic environments and representative multi-turn cases.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Bounded agent-loop portfolio. No external effects occur in this browser lab."""

steps.title: Inspect the failure record
steps.instruction:
Use a changed debug case derived from this module: loops observability evals. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Inspect the Trace Events trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for record decisions, tool calls, results, state changes, timing, and identifiers without exposing private reasoning.

content.text: For Trace Events, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Regression Analysis into observable performance evidence.

options.text: Define the stakeholder decision, quantities, authority, and constraints
Choose and document the smallest defensible model or procedure
Execute the model while preserving inspectable intermediate evidence
Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise

steps.title: Publish the incident record
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Regression Analysis applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Compare agent versions by material outcome slices and investigate regressions.
